## Template Contribution

### Template: `templates/[name]/`

### Checklist

- [ ] All 5 files present: prompt.md, test-cases.json, honeprompt.config.ts, program.md, README.md
- [ ] 5+ test cases with diverse inputs
- [ ] `honeprompt run` executed with results recorded in README
- [ ] 5+ point improvement demonstrated
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data in any file
- [ ] Category set to one of: creators, developers, marketers, saas, general
- [ ] README follows the required format (H1, description, Category, Author, Tags, Sample Run Results table)
- [ ] Template name is lowercase kebab-case

Final: __ / 100
Improvement: +__
Iterations: __
Cost: $__
